Trading Bot Dashboard

Register an account to start trading. More traders → more trades → better statistics.

Log in with Telegram

One click — uses the same account as the bot, so your keys, positions, and stats are shared.

Or use a username & password
Register
Binance API key (testnet)

Get one at Binance → API Management → enable Futures, disable Withdrawals.

Console

One place for everything — Telegram is just the backend.
